data.name: Dungeon Explorers
data.detailed_description:
Rebuild, Conquer, and Fight for Freedom!

Your journey begins in the ruins of a once-thriving village, now on the brink of collapse. As its new leader, it’s up to you to restore its former glory, forge alliances, and prepare for the ultimate battle against the ruthless slavers who threaten the land. But you won’t face this challenge alone…

Along the way, you’ll encounter remarkable and beautiful heroines, each with their own skills, stories, and reasons to fight by your side. Whether leading armies into battle, braving the depths of perilous dungeons, or managing the village’s growth, every decision will shape your destiny.

Command and rebuild – Restore a fallen village and turn it into a thriving stronghold.
Battle powerful enemies – Face brutal foes in combat and forge your legend.
Build deep relationships – Meet incredible women who will fight, love, and grow with you.
Explore dark dungeons – Uncover secrets, loot treasures, and defeat terrifying creatures.
Shape your fate – Your choices matter, determining the future of your people and allies.

The world is cruel, and the road ahead is filled with danger. But with strength, strategy, and the right allies, you can rise from nothing and carve your name into history.

Will you restore what was lost and lead the charge against tyranny? The choice is yours.

data.short_description: An adult RPG game blending village building, dungeon crawling, and captivating love interests. Dynamic choices, resource management, thrilling combat, and deep character interactions create an immersive experience where every decision shapes your village, relationships, and survival.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 8.1 ou 10 (32 ou 64 bits)
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7, 8, 8.1 ou 10 (32 ou 64 bits)
  • Processor: Intel Core 2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 2 GB GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
